perspectives.description: This is the person who has developed an addiction to alcohol and is grappling with the decision to confess or hide their struggles from their parents.
This is the parent of the individual struggling with addiction, who is deeply concerned about their child's well-being and may feel hurt or worried if they find out about the addiction.
This is a younger sibling who may be indirectly affected by the family dynamics and emotional distress caused by the addiction and the decision to hide or confess.
